entry.title: 2026 Federal Utility Partnership Working Group (FUPWG) Seminar
entry.summary: The Federal Utility Partnership Working Group (FUPWG) Seminar meets to share best practices, success stories, case studies, information about Federal Energy Management Program (FEMP) activities, and other business.

entry.title: 2026 Electromagnetic Transient (EMT) Simulation Workshop
entry.summary: NERC, in collaboration with OE and ORNL, will host the 2026 Electromagnetic Transient (EMT) Simulation Workshop on Aug. 18-21, 2026, in Washington, D.C. Researchers, consultants, utilities, system operators, and reliability organizations will explore advancements in EMT simulations, including modeling, simulation techniques, input data structure, and automation tools to support evolving industry needs. This workshop will also feature hands-on tutorials on EMT simulation that is supported by DOE i2x.

entry.title: Ford, Global Power Products debut home backup solution
entry.summary: More than 800 electric utilities have approved GPP’s GenerLink transfer switch, which provides backup power for outlets and hardwired appliances at significantly lower cost than a standby generator, Ford says.

entry.title: Don’t gut the utility model just as we need it most
entry.summary: Cutting utility returns won't lower electric bills and will leave us with a more fragile power grid, writes Scott Aaronson, former secretary of the Electricity Subsector Coordinating Council.

entry.title: Wisconsin gas plant proposals test state review process
entry.summary: Integrated resource planning would give regulators a clearer long-term picture of electricity needs before major energy investments are approved, advocates say.

entry.title: SRP to propose up to 1.7-GW mixed-resource project to its board in September
entry.summary: The Marigold Energy Center, about 45 miles south of Phoenix, would include 400 MW of battery storage, 600 MW of solar generation, up to 675 MW of gas generation and a new substation.

entry.title: CO2 emissions from US power sector rose 4% last year
entry.summary: The rise in emissions was linked to increased electricity generation and coal use, the U.S. Energy Information Administration said.

entry.title: 3 practical steps to ensure the US industrial boom runs on electricity
entry.summary: Long-term electricity procurement, on-site generation, efficiency and flexibility can give manufacturers more ways to manage their energy bills, writes the World Wildlife Fund’s Cihang Yuan.

entry.title: US data center electricity use could more than double by 2030: report
entry.summary: Policy responses “reflect a tension between furthering state-level economic development interests and balancing local community health and environmental concerns,” the Kansas Health Institute report states.

entry.title: FERC fails to shield PJM consumers from data center transmission costs: ratepayer advocates
entry.summary: The Federal Energy Regulatory Commission’s large load “show cause” order for the PJM Interconnection fails to address cost allocation of network upgrades, advocates from five states said.

entry.title: $215B in annual energy cost savings starts with heat pumps: ACEEE
entry.summary: Building and other electric efficiency measures would reduce growing peak demand by 20% on average through 2050, according to the American Council for an Energy-Efficient Economy.

entry.title: Best Buy adds more solar generation to portfolio
entry.summary: The new solar sites include the retailer’s first store with a rooftop “community solar garden” as it looks to a 2040 net-zero target.
